summary: Completed comprehensive testing of stock prediction app. Backend APIs mostly functional with Alpha Vantage limitations. Frontend UI fully functional with chart upload working.

critical_bugs.issue: Alpha Vantage demo API key returns 'demo purposes only' message instead of real data
critical_bugs.impact: Stock search, quotes, and predictions fail with 404 errors

fixed_bugs.issue: UserMessage constructor used incorrect parameter 'image_contents' instead of 'file_contents'
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Changed image_contents to file_contents in emergentintegrations library call

integration_issues.issue: No search suggestions appear and predictions fail due to backend Alpha Vantage API limitations

passed_tests: Backend health check with 2975+ patterns loaded
Chart analysis API working with AI predictions
Frontend loads correctly with all UI components
Stock search input and predict button functional
Chart image analysis with AI predictions working
Patterns modal opens and displays pattern database

success_percentage.backend: 75% (6/8 API endpoints working, 2 blocked by Alpha Vantage demo key)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all UI components working, only stock data integration affected by backend API issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Replace Alpha Vantage demo API key with a valid API key. The demo key returns 'demo purposes only' message and blocks stock search, quotes, and predictions. All other functionality including AI chart analysis is working correctly.
